sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62905" key="lhmhro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λημ-ηρός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n62905.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">misty</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λημηρῇ νεφέλῃ εἰλυμένος ὄσσε</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.36.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
